About Our School

Tapti Vidhya Vihar School is a leading educational institution located at Hariom Nagar, Bamroli Road, Pandesara, Surat. Founded with a vision to provide quality education to children from Nursery through Standard 8, the school has been a trusted name in the community for years.

Our school offers fully air-conditioned classrooms designed with colourful educational wall murals that make learning fun and engaging. We believe in holistic development — combining strong academics with cultural, creative, and sporting activities throughout the year. From Independence Day celebrations and Kite Festivals to cultural performances, every child gets the opportunity to shine.

We are committed to our motto: "Sarvashreshtha Shiksha Hi Hamara Uddeshya" — Excellence in Education is Our Goal. Our dedicated teaching staff ensures every child receives individual attention and grows with confidence.
